creator: ota@j.email.ne.jp
text:
"devel/p5-gearmand is replaced by devel/p5-Gearman-Server" according to http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/devel/p5-gearmand/Attic/Makefile, but devel/Makefile still contains "SUBDIR += p5-gearmand."

Fix: 

Remove "SUBDIR += p5-gearmand" from devel/Makefile.
